codeReview.summary: The feature correctly migrates setup steps to StepActions and adds Enter/Escape/Ctrl+C handling plus idempotency guards, but it does not satisfy the contract requirement that focus lands on the primary button when entering each interactive step.

issues.description: _focus_step_target('step-username') focuses #username-input instead of the step primary button (#username-next). The feature contract requires focus to land on the primary button on step entrance (features.json:599).

The focus contract test asserts username-step focus on the input widget, which codifies behavior that conflicts with the feature contract (primary should be focused). This leaves the blocking focus mismatch untested.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission feature verification steps still include a tty-attaching setup command that conflicts with mission/skill safety rules.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:606 includes 'timeout 8 uv run cc-sentiment setup ...'; mission AGENTS.md:41 forbids running `uv run cc-sentiment setup`; .factory/skills/tui-worker/SKILL.md:22,53 also forbid this command and require Pilot-only verification.

summary: Review failed due to a contract mismatch: username-step entrance focus targets the input instead of the primary action button. The rest of the button/keyboard wiring and idempotency scaffolding is broadly aligned with the feature goals.
